## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph description of this change -->

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement (bug fix, clarification, new section)
- [ ] CLI change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Framework / spec change

## Skill Checklist

<!-- Complete this section if adding or modifying a skill -->

- [ ] `name` in frontmatter is kebab-case and matches directory name
- [ ] `version` follows semver (bumped if modifying existing skill)
- [ ] `description` is 1-3 concrete sentences
- [ ] Required sections present: Title, Core Philosophy, The {Process}, Safety Guards, Quick Reference
- [ ] Required sections are in the correct order (per SKILL_SPEC.md)
- [ ] Safety guards are specific and enforceable
- [ ] Rules use "Always/Never X when Y; because Z" format
- [ ] No Mermaid diagrams (text-based box-drawing only)
- [ ] All code blocks have language identifiers
- [ ] `registry.yaml` updated (for new skills)
- [ ] `skills/<name>/README.md` included (for new skills)
- [ ] Tested with at least one AI tool

## Governance

- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] I certify that this contribution is compatible with the project's MIT license ([DCO](https://developercertificate.org/))
